description: Correct Wednesday EP litany response capitalisation (1 of 6)
reason: Same ACC typographic convention — lowercase congregation responses in the Wednesday EP litany

new: to declare the mystery of Christ.

old: Behold and tend the vine you have planted.
new: behold and tend the vine you have planted.

description: Correct Wednesday EP litany response capitalisation (5 of 6)
old: And forget not the poor forever.

description: Correct Wednesday EP litany response capitalisation (6 of 6)
old: As we have put our hope in you.
